/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libsubmarine_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/submarine_interfaces/libsubmarine_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/submarine_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/submarine_interfaces/msg/_submarine_state_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/suriya_prakash/task3_ws/build/submarine_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libsubmarine_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libsubmarine_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
